sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74449" key="o)/piqe" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄπῐθε</orth> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄπῐθεν</orth>, poet. and late Gr. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄπισθε, ὄπισθεν.</foreign> </entryFree>
